title: Genesis eval scenario
description: Single scenario file for genesis-evals. One YAML per scenario. The 'model' field is REQUIRED -- the runner refuses to spawn without it.

category.description: P=positive value-add (with vs without skill); N=near-miss / dispatch hygiene (skill loaded must NOT activate); R=regression (zero tolerance)

model.description: REQUIRED. Model id requested for the cold sub-agent. Runner refuses to spawn if omitted. No silent default.

loaded_skills.description: Skills to load in the cold sub-agent. For P with-half, include 'genesis'; for P without-half, omit. For N: include 'genesis' (testing dispatch hygiene). For R: as needed.

frozen_since.description: Genesis version at which this scenario was added. Provenance only; not enforced at runtime.

retired_in.description: Genesis version at which this scenario was retired. If non-null, runner skips it.
